overview: A functional medicine clinic offering personalized, drug-free care based on comprehensive LabCorp labs (67 biomarkers). Services include functional medicine, clinical nutrition, chiropractic care, and bio-resonance therapy for chronic disease reversal and optimal aging.
highlights: Comprehensive LabCorp lab panel (67 biomarkers) assessing pituitary, thyroid, liver, GI tract, adrenals, and inflammation
Integrated functional medicine, nutrition, chiropractic care, and bio-resonance
Electronic Signaling Technologies for conditions like neuropathy
targetAudience: Patients seeking drug-free, holistic management of chronic conditions and preventative health optimization.
